nasb.text: So David took the spear and the jug of water from beside Saul’s head, and they went away, but no one saw or knew it, nor did any awake, for they were all asleep, because a sound sleep from the Lord had fallen on them.

esv.text: So David took the spear and the jar of water from Saul’s head, and they went away. No man saw it or knew it, nor did any awake, for they were all asleep, because a deep sleep from the Lord had fallen upon them.

cnv.text: 於是大衛從掃羅的頭旁拿了矛和水袋，他們二人就走了。沒有人看見，沒有人知道，也沒有人醒來。他們都睡著了，因為耶和華使他們沉睡。

ccb.text: 大卫拿上扫罗的矛和水瓶同亚比筛离开了，没有人看见，没有人知道，他们都在沉睡，没有人醒来，因为耶和华使他们都熟睡了。
